text:
Handling signatures for posting in moderated groups
	keywords: news, pgp, moderation

Fix: 

the following archive create a directory pgpmoose-1
	this can be installed in the directory "/usr/ports/news".
	ftp://ftp.dinoex.sub.de/pub/appoved/ports-pgpmoose-1.tar.gz
How-To-Repeat: 
	port does not exists in the distribution
